category_sources: Official GitHub README describes yutu as a CLI, MCP server, and AI agent for YouTube workflows.
source_facts.description says it is an MCP server and CLI for YouTube.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README is the primary documentation surface and links installation/usage sections.
Official repository contains a docs directory for project documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already supplies https://github.com/eat-pray-ai/yutu; repo returned null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official README describes YouTube workflow automation, uploads, comments, playlists, and channel branding.
source_facts.description identifies MCP server, CLI, and YouTube.
